nav.import.desc: Import CSV/XLSX files from your bank accounts
nav.ledger.desc: Browse and filter all imported transactions
nav.bulk_edit.desc: Edit category, context or internal transfer on groups of transactions
nav.analytics.desc: Interactive charts on income, expenses and trends
nav.report.desc: Spending report by context and category with Excel export
nav.budget_vs_actual.desc: Compare actual spending with budget targets
nav.settings.desc: Bank accounts, LLM backend and general preferences
nav.checklist.desc: Verify completeness and quality of imported data
sidebar.title: 🏦 Spendif.ai
sidebar.llm_warning: ⚠️ AI processing in progress. Changing page will interrupt the process.
sidebar.nav_confirm_msg: You are about to leave the current page. AI processing will be interrupted.
ledger.title: 📋 Ledger — Transaction Register
ledger.sort.label: Sort by
ledger.no_transactions: No transactions found with the selected filters.
review.title: 🔍 Review — Manual Review
review.rerun_llm_empty: 🔄 Reprocess with LLM (no transactions pending review)
review.rerun_transfers_help: Re-runs amount+date matching on ALL transactions in the DB. Useful after importing files from different accounts.
review.transfers_found: Found and marked **{n}** new transactions as internal transfers.
review.transfers_none: No new internal transfer pairs found.
review.save_as_rule: Save as deterministic rule (apply to all similar transactions)
review.apply_similar: Also apply to {n} other transactions with the same description
review.fan_out_found: Found **{n}** similar uncategorized transactions. Apply the same category?
review.bulk_desc_caption: Replaces the description of all transactions whose **raw description** matches the pattern, then re-categorizes with the LLM.
review.bulk_pattern: Pattern to search in raw description
review.bulk_new_desc_placeholder: Enter the description that will replace the original
review.bulk_save_rule: Save as rule (reusable in the future)
history.title: Import history
history.confirm_cancel: Confirm cancellation of import **{filename}** ({n} transactions)? Transactions will be permanently deleted.
budget.title: 💰 Budget — Spending Targets
budget.caption: Set the budget percentage for each expense category. The total should not exceed 100%.
budget.no_categories: No expense categories configured. Go to the Taxonomy page to set them up.
bva.title: 📊 Budget vs Actual
bva.no_data: No data available for the selected period.
report.title: 📋 Report — Spending by Context and Category
report.no_transactions: No transactions available with the selected filters.
report.where_money_goes_caption: Summary table by context and category. Internal transfers excluded.
rules.title: 📏 Categorization Rules
rules.caption: Rules are applied before the LLM. By editing or deleting a rule you can also update transactions already categorized by that rule.
rules.no_rules: No rules saved. Create your first rules below or from the Review page.
rules.run_all_caption: Apply all active rules to **all** transactions in the ledger. For each transaction the first matching rule (by priority) wins. Unmatched transactions remain unchanged.
rules.run_all_confirm: I confirm: I want to overwrite categories of all transactions matching a rule
rules.run_all_done: ✅ Done — **{matched}** transactions updated ({cleared} marked as reviewed).
rules.context_help: If set, it will be assigned to the transaction. Leave '— nessuno —' to not change it.
rules.also_update_txs: Also update the {n} transactions already categorized by this rule
taxonomy.title: 🗂️ Taxonomy — Categories and Subcategories
taxonomy.caption: Changes are saved immediately to the database. New categories/subcategories are instantly available in Review and Rules.
checklist.title: ✅ Checklist — Transactions by month and account
checklist.caption: One row per month (current at the top), one column per account. The value is the transaction count; **—** means no transactions for that month.
checklist.no_data: No accounts and no transactions found. Add accounts from **Settings** and import movement files.
checklist.filter_accounts_help: Leave empty to show all accounts.
checklist.hide_empty_help: Hides months where no account has transactions.
checklist.no_filtered_data: No data to show with the selected filters.
settings.title: ⚙️ Settings
settings.desc_language_caption: The language in which bank statement descriptions are written. Used by the LLM categorizer to interpret transactions correctly.
settings.ui_language_caption: The language used for menus, labels and filters in the app. / La lingua per menu, etichette e filtri dell'app.
settings.giroconto_mode_caption: Defines how internal transfers (between your own accounts) appear in the ledger and analytics. *Show* includes them as neutral rows; *Exclude* hides them.
settings.owners_caption: Names of account holders (comma-separated). Automatically removed from descriptions before sending to remote LLMs to protect privacy.
settings.use_owners_giroconto: Use owner names to identify internal transfers
settings.use_owners_giroconto_help: When enabled, transactions whose description contains an owner name are automatically marked as internal transfers.
settings.contexts_caption: Define the contexts to classify transactions (e.g. Everyday, Work, Vacation). You can assign a context to each transaction from the Ledger.
settings.force_schema_help: When enabled, files are imported automatically even when schema classification has low confidence. Useful for expert users who prefer speed over manual review. A warning is shown if confidence is < 0.50.
settings.force_schema_active: ⚠️ Schema review is disabled — all files are imported with the detected schema.
settings.test_mode: Test mode (first 20 rows per file only)
settings.test_mode_help: Imports only the first 20 rows of each file to quickly verify schema classification.
settings.test_mode_active: ⚠️ Test mode active — only the first 20 rows will be processed.
settings.max_tx_amount_help: Columns with median value above this threshold are discarded as amount columns (e.g. 'Reference' columns with numeric IDs). Increase only if you have real transactions above €1,000,000.
settings.accounts_caption: Define your bank accounts. The account name is used as a stable key for transaction dedup (independent of the imported file name). Associate each file with the correct account on the Import page.
settings.no_accounts: No accounts configured. Add one to associate it with imported files.
settings.schema_cache_caption: Spendif.ai stores the structure of imported files to speed up subsequent imports. If a file was imported with the wrong schema (e.g. missing columns), clear the cache and re-import.
settings.clear_schemas_help: Removes all schemas from cache. On the next import, files will be re-analyzed.
settings.backend.openai_compatible: OpenAI-compatible (Groq, Together AI, Google AI Studio…)
settings.llama_cpp.caption: Local backend based on llama.cpp — no external server required. Download a GGUF model and Spendif.ai uses it directly.
settings.llama_cpp.model_path_help: Leave empty to automatically use the first .gguf file found in ~/.spendifai/models/
settings.llama_cpp.gpu_layers_help: -1 automatic GPU offload, 0 use CPU only
settings.llama_cpp.select_local_placehol: Select to auto-fill path and context window…
settings.llama_cpp.no_models: No GGUF model found in ~/.spendifai/models/. Download one below.
settings.llama_cpp.n_ctx_help: Number of tokens in the context window. Higher values require more RAM. The model's native limit is shown after Test LLM.
settings.ollama.pull_help: Download or update the model on Ollama
settings.ollama.connection_error: ❌ Cannot connect to Ollama at {url}. Verify the server is running.
settings.test_llm_help: Verify that the LLM backend responds correctly
settings.test_llm_validation_error: ❌ LLM responded but with validation error: {error}
settings.test_llm_connection_error:
❌ Cannot connect to the backend. Verify URL and that the server is running.

`{error}`
settings.test_llm_auth_error:
❌ Authentication error. Verify the API key.

`{error}`
settings.compat.caption: Compatible with any API exposing `/v1/chat/completions` (Groq, Together AI, Google AI Studio, etc.)
settings.power_user_caption: Preset for expert users: enable all advanced options, disable confirmations, maximize automation.
settings.power_user_applied: Power User profile applied! • Forced import without schema confirmation • Max amount: 10M€ • Press 💾 Save to confirm.
settings.reset_taxonomy_warning: ⚠️ This operation **replaces** all categories and subcategories with the default template for the selected language. Already categorized transactions are **not** modified.
settings.reset_taxonomy_confirm: I confirm: I want to overwrite the current taxonomy
onboarding.title: 👋 Welcome to Spendif.ai
onboarding.subtitle: Initial setup — it will take less than 2 minutes.
onboarding.no_taxonomy: No default taxonomy found in the database.
onboarding.step0.title: 🌍 Language and Format
onboarding.step0.caption: Choose the taxonomy language and date/amount formats. We detected your browser language — you can change it.
onboarding.step1.title: 👤 Owner Names
onboarding.step1.caption: Enter the name(s) of the account holder(s), separated by comma. They are used to automatically detect **internal transfers** between your own accounts and to clean transaction descriptions.
onboarding.step1.hint: 💡 Example: `John Doe, Jane Doe` — include all name variants as they appear in bank statement files.
onboarding.step1.label: Owner name(s)
onboarding.step1.warning: ⚠️ Enter at least one name to continue.
onboarding.step2.title: 🏦 Bank Accounts
onboarding.step2.caption: Add your bank accounts, cards and investment accounts. The **account name** is a free label (e.g. *BankX checking*, *Visa Card*). You can add more accounts anytime from ⚙️ Settings.
onboarding.step2.no_accounts_warning: ⚠️ No account added. You can continue but transaction dedup may not be stable.
onboarding.step3.title: ✅ Summary
onboarding.step3.caption: Review settings and click **Start** to apply them.
onboarding.step3.llm_recommended: HW: {gpu} · {ram} GB RAM → Recommended: **{name}** ({size} MB). Will be downloaded on first import.
onboarding.step3.llm_none: No compatible model found. Configure manually in Settings.
bulk_edit.title: ✏️ Bulk Edit
bulk_edit.caption: Select a transaction and apply category, context or internal transfer status to all similar transactions. You can also save a deterministic rule.
bulk_edit.same_desc_info: **{same_desc}** tx with same description · **{same_raw}** with same raw text · **{similar}** similar (Jaccard ≥ 35%)
bulk_edit.section2_caption: Re-run counterpart extraction and/or categorization on a selection of transactions. The LLM backend configured in Settings will be used.
bulk_edit.extract_counterpart_help: Re-extracts the merchant/counterpart name from the raw_description
bulk_edit.recategorize_help: Re-applies deterministic rules and LLM for category/subcategory
bulk_edit.no_tx_found_criteria: No transactions found for the selected criteria.
bulk_edit.apply_same_desc_giro: Also apply to {n} tx with same description
bulk_edit.apply_same_desc_ctx: Apply to {n} tx with same description
bulk_edit.save_as_rule_help: Creates a 'contains' rule that applies this category to all transactions with similar description in the future.
bulk_edit.apply_same_desc_cat: Apply now to {n} tx with same description
bulk_edit.giro_no_category: Transaction marked as internal transfer — category correction is not applicable.
bulk_edit.section4_caption: Define selection criteria, check how many transactions will be deleted and confirm. **This operation is irreversible.**
bulk_edit.filter.desc_placeholder: filter by text in description or raw…
bulk_edit.no_filter_warning: ⚠️ No filter set — set at least one criterion before proceeding.
bulk_edit.no_match_filter: No transactions match the selected filters.
bulk_edit.confirm_delete_instruction: To confirm, type exactly **`DELETE`** in the field below and press the button.
bulk_edit.confirm_delete_placeholder: type DELETE to enable the button
bulk_edit.section5_caption: Transactions with same **date**, **raw description** and **amount** present on different accounts. Typically caused by overlapping imports (e.g. account statement + card statement).
bulk_edit.dup_groups_found: Found **{n_groups} groups** of duplicates — **{n_extra} excess transactions** (one per group is the original).
bulk_edit.dup_delete_info: The button deletes **excess copies** keeping the first transaction per group (by import date order).
bulk_edit.confirm_dup_placeholder: type DELETE to enable the button
analytics.title: 📊 Analytics
analytics.no_transactions: No transactions found with the selected filters.
analytics.giro_excluded: Internal transfers excluded from analytics (setting: exclude).
analytics.no_data_selection: No data for the selected category.
analytics.anomaly_caption: Compares your spending distribution against an Italian family reference benchmark, scaled by household size.
analytics.ref_help: Ratio of your % vs benchmark %. Values above 1.5× are flagged as high, below 0.5× as low.
analytics.no_anomalies: ✅ No significant anomalies detected. Your spending is within normal range.
analytics.no_expenses_period: No expenses in the selected period.
analytics.associations_caption: Descriptions with at least 3 validated transactions. High homogeneity (🟢) means auto-categorization is reliable.
analytics.assoc.summary: **Summary**: {n_auto} auto-categorizable (🟢), {n_mixed} mixed (🟡), {n_hetero} heterogeneous (🔴) — across {n_total} descriptions with at least 3 validations.
analytics.assoc.no_data: No associations available. Manually validate some transactions to enable auto-learning.
upload.title: 📥 Import
upload.metric.file_rows_help: Total data rows in the file (excluding header rows)
upload.metric.aggregated_help: Rows merged into a single transaction (e.g. multi-line entries)
upload.metric.transfers_help: Transactions automatically detected as internal transfers between your accounts
upload.unaccounted_rows: ⚠️ {unaccounted} rows not accounted for (total={total}, imported={imported}, dedup={dedup}, skipped={skipped}, merged={merged})
upload.all_already_present: All transactions in this file were already present in the database.
upload.schema_review_warning: ⚠️ {n} file(s) require schema review before import.
upload.schema.no_rows_parsed: No rows could be parsed with this schema.
upload.owner_names_missing: ⚠️ Owner names are not configured. Go to Settings to add them before importing.
upload.job_running: ⏳ An import is already running. Please wait for it to complete.
upload.no_files_hint: Select one or more bank statement files to begin the import.
upload.no_accounts_warning: ⚠️ No accounts configured. Go to Settings to add bank accounts.
upload.associate_files: **Associate each file with an account** (or leave auto-detect):
upload.first_upload_warning: ⚠️ First upload for **{filename}** ({rows} rows). The system will analyse the file structure with LLM.
upload.skip_rows_help: Number of rows to skip at the top of the file (before the header row).
chat.title: Spendif.ai Assistant
chat.welcome: Hi! I'm the Spendif.ai assistant. How can I help you?
